title: DY13 9RW, Slicker Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/GP3030EA/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Slicker Recycling Limited Installation name: Stourport Oil Treatment Plant Permit number: EPR/GP3030EA/V008  "
